war_cry.name: War Cry
war_cry.desc: all-red match → 30%: the enemy strikes at once

mana_sear.name: Mana Sear
mana_sear.desc: all-red match → burn 3 Fire mana + 4 damage

press_swarm.name: Press the Swarm
press_swarm.desc: all-blue match → warp 2 cards toward Fire (herding)

molten_veins.name: Molten Veins
molten_veins.desc: all-red match → 4 dmg + warp the center column to Fire

confusion.name: Confusion
confusion.desc: rainbow (all-different colour) match → the foe quickens by the set’s weight (1+2+3 → 2s · 3/3/3 → 5s)

limbless.name: Limbless
limbless.desc: all-Move + all-1s match → the zombie lurches: Moves in your bottom row lock 5s, then the row warps toward Move

tremor.name: Tremor
tremor.desc: every 12s the ground quakes, rattling your useless shields loose into Moves

outmaneuvered.name: Outmaneuvered
outmaneuvered.desc: all-Move match → you dance aside; the behemoth lumbers after you, +5s before it can strike

ethereal_cackle.name: Ethereal Cackle
ethereal_cackle.desc: all-Attack match → he cackles at your flailing and melts every sword into a Move

war_cry_lesser.name: Lesser War Cry
war_cry_lesser.desc: all-red match → 30%: 5 damage (a foretaste of the King’s War Cry)

ember_sweep.name: Ember Sweep
ember_sweep.desc: all-red match → warp the bottom row toward Fire (an elite sweep)

red_threes_omen.name: Crimson Omen
red_threes_omen.desc: all-red + all-Threes match → 35%: the elite strikes at once

mana_sear_lesser.name: Lesser Mana Sear
mana_sear_lesser.desc: all-red match → burn 2 Fire mana (a foretaste of the Emberlord's sear)

life_drain.name: Life Drain
life_drain.desc: all-green match → 4 dmg + the undead knits 4 HP whole

life_drain_lesser.name: Lesser Life Drain
life_drain_lesser.desc: all-green match → the undead leeches 4 HP (a foretaste of the crypt-lord)

bone_volley.name: Bone Volley
bone_volley.desc: all-Attack match → a volley of bone shards, 5 dmg

gnaw_swarm.name: Gnawing Swarm
gnaw_swarm.desc: all-Attack match → the swarm boils over you — 3 dmg + it strikes 2s sooner

fester.name: Fester
fester.desc: all-green match → 3 dmg + the bloat festers 3 HP whole

fester_lesser.name: Lesser Fester
fester_lesser.desc: all-green match → the plague knits 3 HP (a foretaste of the Ratking)

web_snare.name: Web Snare
web_snare.desc: all-Move match → silk binds 2 runes 6s and one warps to a useless shield

web_snare_lesser.name: Lesser Web Snare
web_snare_lesser.desc: all-Move match → silk binds a rune 5s (a foretaste of the Broodmother)

venom_bite.name: Venom Bite
venom_bite.desc: all-Attack match → venom by the set's weight (1+2+3 → 2 · 3/3/3 → 5 dmg)

frost_sear.name: Frost Sear
frost_sear.desc: all-blue match → burn 3 Frost mana + 4 dmg

frost_sear_lesser.name: Lesser Frost Sear
frost_sear_lesser.desc: all-blue match → burn 3 Frost mana (a foretaste of the deep cold)

drowning_grip.name: Drowning Grip
drowning_grip.desc: all-Move match → the black water drags 2 runes under 6s and floods the center column to Frost

entomb_trap.name: Entomb
entomb_trap.desc: all-Defend match → stone seals 2 runes away for 5s

sand_curse.name: Sand Curse
sand_curse.desc: all-Threes match → the old curse saps 3 Tactics + 3 dmg

sand_curse_lesser.name: Lesser Sand Curse
sand_curse_lesser.desc: all-Defend match → stone seals a rune 5s (a foretaste of the Scarab King)

hex_drain.name: Hex
hex_drain.desc: all-blue match → the hex bleeds 4 Serpent (blue) mana

hex_lesser.name: Lesser Hex
hex_lesser.desc: all-blue match → the hex bleeds 2 Serpent (blue) mana (a foretaste of the Serpent Lord)

serpent_omen.name: Serpent Omen
serpent_omen.desc: all-green + all-Threes match → 35%: the serpent strikes at once

rime_blast.name: Rime Blast
rime_blast.desc: all-blue match → 5 dmg + the center column freezes to Frost

hellfire.name: Hellfire
hellfire.desc: all-red match → 6 dmg + the center column erupts to Fire

chaos_surge.name: Chaos Surge
chaos_surge.desc: rainbow match → 3 dmg + the demon quickens by the set's weight

brimstone_lesser.name: Lesser Brimstone
brimstone_lesser.desc: all-red match → 30%: 6 dmg (a foretaste of the Demon Lord)

dragon_breath.name: Dragon Breath
dragon_breath.desc: all-red match → a gout of flame, 7 dmg + the bottom row ignites to Fire

wing_buffet.name: Wing Buffet
wing_buffet.desc: all-Move match → a wingbeat pins 2 runes 5s and it strikes 3s sooner

hoard_greed.name: Hoard Greed
hoard_greed.desc: all-Threes match → it snatches your heaviest rune and strikes 2s sooner

breath_lesser.name: Lesser Breath
breath_lesser.desc: all-red match → 30%: 6 dmg + a rune scorches to Fire (a foretaste of the Wyrm)

soul_chill.name: Soul Chill
soul_chill.desc: every 7s: 4 unblockable dread damage + the lich knits 3 HP

soul_siphon.name: Soul Siphon
soul_siphon.desc: all-blue match → 5 dmg drained straight into the wraith (heals 5)

death_grip.name: Death Grip
death_grip.desc: all-Move match → cold hands seize 3 runes for 6s

annihilate.name: Annihilate
annihilate.desc: all-red match → a blast of ruin, 9 dmg

inferno.name: Inferno Drift
inferno.desc: the deep-fire floods the board — two runes turn to Fire

brimstone.name: Brimstone Drift
brimstone.desc: hellfire boils two runes to Fire

scavenge.name: Scavenger Drift
scavenge.desc: the warren hoards — a rune is dragged toward Three

grave_chill.name: Grave Chill
grave_chill.desc: the cold of the tomb creeps over the board toward Frost

tide.name: Tide Drift
tide.desc: the black water rises — runes drown into Frost

rime.name: Rime Drift
rime.desc: frost rimes two runes toward Frost

entomb.name: Sand Drift
entomb.desc: drifting sand buries your runes under Stone (Defend)

training_dummy.name: Training Dummy
training_dummy.desc: A straw-stuffed practice dummy on a creaky pivot. It cannot hurt you — take all the time you need to learn the ropes.

limbless_zombie.name: Limbless Zombie
limbless_zombie.desc: A zombie with no limbs, chin-crawling across the floor toward you. Harmless — until it gathers itself for a sudden lurch.

dread_behemoth.name: Dread Behemoth
dread_behemoth.desc: A mountain that walks. Its blow is certain death, so blocking is futile — but it is ponderously slow. Its tremors shake your useless Defend cards loose into Moves; spend a Move set and you dance aside, leaving it a step behind. Stay mobile, bank Tactics, and break it with a decisive strike.

unstable_ethereal_goblin.name: Unstable Ethereal Goblin
unstable_ethereal_goblin.desc: A goblin who gulped a Potion of Etherealness and a Potion of Polymorph at once — now a flickering wisp of raw magic. Swords pass right through him (Attack cards deal no damage). Only magic bites: every ability you cast drains him by the mana you spent. Spend 15 mana of spells to dispel him.

goblin_archer.name: Goblin Archer
goblin_archer.desc: A wiry goblin loosing crude arrows from a ledge — quick to panic, quicker to flee.

goblin_sapper.name: Goblin Sapper
goblin_sapper.desc: A grubby goblin lugging fire-bombs — more dangerous to your board than to you.

warren_rat.name: Warren Rat
warren_rat.desc: A fat, fearless rat the size of a dog. It comes in a chittering rush.

goblin_warlord.name: Goblin Warlord
goblin_warlord.desc: A scarred captain in looted plate, bellowing the King’s own war-cry. His red rage foretells the throne room.

ember_shaman.name: Ember Shaman
ember_shaman.desc: A goblin mystic wreathed in cinders, dragging whole rows of your runes into the fire — the warren’s drift made a weapon.

warren_butcher.name: The Warren Butcher
warren_butcher.desc: A hulking goblin gone to fat and cruelty, a cleaver in each hand. Slow, but every red blow lands like the King’s.

goblin_oracle.name: Goblin Oracle
goblin_oracle.desc: A wild-eyed seer who reads doom in the runes — crimson and threefold, and the strike comes at once.

emberkin.name: Emberkin
emberkin.desc: A coal-bodied imp clawed up from the deep vents, trailing sparks.

magma_bat.name: Magma Bat
magma_bat.desc: A bat with cinders for eyes, diving in searing flickers.

cinder_shaman.name: Cinder Shaman
cinder_shaman.desc: A robed ember-caller dragging your runes into the coals.

slag_brute.name: Slag Brute
slag_brute.desc: A lumbering thing of cooled lava, cracking molten with every step.

molten_warlord.name: Molten Warlord
molten_warlord.desc: A warlord sheathed in glowing slag, bellowing the deep-fire’s war-cry — the Emberlord is near.

ash_oracle.name: Ash Oracle
ash_oracle.desc: A blind seer of ash, reading ruin in the embers and pulling whole rows into the fire.

emberlord.name: The Emberlord
emberlord.desc: The molten heart of the Emberdeep — a crowned giant of living fire, the warren’s King made small beside him. Where the Goblin King clubs, the Emberlord drinks the very magic from your veins.

dire_rat.name: Dire Rat
dire_rat.desc: A rat the size of a hound, red-eyed and rabid, leading the chittering tide.

plague_rat.name: Plague Rat
plague_rat.desc: A bloated, sore-ridden vermin trailing a haze of sickness.

sewer_slime.name: Sewer Slime
sewer_slime.desc: A creeping ooze of refuse and rot — slow, but it mends every gash by drinking the filth.

giant_centipede.name: Giant Centipede
giant_centipede.desc: A glistening length of chitin and legs, mandibles weeping venom.

plague_bloat.name: Plague Bloat
plague_bloat.desc: A swollen horror of the deep drains, splitting at the seams with contagion — the Ratking's herald.

rat_ogre.name: Rat Ogre
rat_ogre.desc: A monstrous thing of stitched vermin and gristle, bred in the deep warrens to break men.

the_ratking.name: The Ratking
the_ratking.desc: A knot of a dozen rats fused tail-to-tail into one crowned, scheming mind — the filth made sovereign. Every wound it takes, the swarm simply knits closed.

giant_spider.name: Giant Spider
giant_spider.desc: A horse-sized hunting spider that drops on silk from the black canopy.

spiderling_swarm.name: Spiderling Swarm
spiderling_swarm.desc: A boiling carpet of hatchlings, here and gone before you can stamp them out.

venom_wasp.name: Venom Wasp
venom_wasp.desc: A wasp as long as your forearm, its sting a hot spike of poison.

forest_lurker.name: Forest Lurker
forest_lurker.desc: A lean, moss-furred predator that pads silent between the boles.

ambush_vine.name: Ambush Vine
ambush_vine.desc: A coil of thorned creeper that lies still as deadwood — until it lashes out and drags you down.

ettercap.name: Ettercap
ettercap.desc: A hunched, clawed spider-keeper that strings the Tangleweald with snares — the Broodmother's shepherd.

corrupt_treant.name: Corrupt Treant
corrupt_treant.desc: A great tree gone black with blight, walking on root-claws, its hollow groan promising the deep wood's hunger.

the_broodmother.name: The Broodmother
the_broodmother.desc: The vast pale spider at the heart of the web, her egg-sacs pulsing in the dark. Her silk binds you fast while her bite drinks you dry.

skeleton.name: Skeleton
skeleton.desc: A rattling warrior of dry bone, sword still gripped in a fleshless hand.

skeletal_archer.name: Skeletal Archer
skeletal_archer.desc: A bowman of bone loosing shaft after shaft from the dark of the niches.

rotting_zombie.name: Rotting Zombie
rotting_zombie.desc: A shambling corpse, slow as grief — but the grave-rot mends it as fast as you cut.

ghoul.name: Ghoul
ghoul.desc: A gaunt, loping eater of the dead whose touch leaves the limbs cold and still.

wight.name: Wight
wight.desc: A barrow-dead noble wreathed in cold, draining the warmth of the living to feed its hate.

bone_knight.name: Bone Knight
bone_knight.desc: A dead champion in rusted plate, still keeping a grave-cold vigil. Its volleys herald the crypt-lord.

crypt_wraith.name: Crypt Wraith
crypt_wraith.desc: A hovering shroud of cold malice that drifts through stone and guard alike to drink the living dry.

the_barrow_wight.name: The Barrow-Wight
the_barrow_wight.desc: The crowned dead king of the barrow, risen on a tide of grave-cold. It paralyzes the living, drinks their warmth, and tolls the dread of the tomb without end.

deep_one.name: Deep One
deep_one.desc: A hunched fish-thing of the black depths, webbed claws and a mouthful of needles.

fishman_raider.name: Fishman Raider
fishman_raider.desc: A wiry deep-dweller wielding a barbed coral spear, quick as a current.

drowned_thrall.name: Drowned Thrall
drowned_thrall.desc: A sailor long dead and water-logged, dragging others down to share its grave.

abyssal_eel.name: Abyssal Eel
abyssal_eel.desc: A serpent of the lightless deep, jaws unhinging out of the murk.

deep_one_priest.name: Deep One Priest
deep_one_priest.desc: A robed elder of the deep, chanting the cold litany that freezes the warmth from a caster's veins — the drowned god's voice.

tide_horror.name: Tide Horror
tide_horror.desc: A heaving mass of barnacled tentacles and drowned bone that surges up from the flooded nave.

the_drowned_god.name: The Drowned God
the_drowned_god.desc: The thing the deep ones worship, dragged half-waking from the trench below the temple — an island of cold flesh and drinking dark. It floods the board, drowns your runes, and freezes the spell from your blood.

mummy.name: Mummy
mummy.desc: A bandaged dead king's servant, shuffling on legs stiff with ten centuries of resin and curse.

animated_statue.name: Animated Statue
animated_statue.desc: A basalt tomb-warden that stands as still as art — until you turn your back, and it does not.

scarab_swarm.name: Scarab Swarm
scarab_swarm.desc: A glittering flood of carrion-beetles that pours from the cracked sarcophagi.

tomb_guardian.name: Tomb Guardian
tomb_guardian.desc: An armored sentinel bound by old rites to seal the burial-ways behind walls of stone.

high_mummy.name: High Mummy
high_mummy.desc: A vizier of the old dynasty, gold-masked and wrapped in cursed linen, who speaks the Scarab King's plagues.

bone_colossus.name: Bone Colossus
bone_colossus.desc: A titan stitched from a hundred skeletons into one looming horror — a tomb-wall given fists.

the_scarab_king.name: The Scarab King
the_scarab_king.desc: The deathless pharaoh on his beetle-throne, half man and half writhing scarab-host. He buries your board under sand and stone, saps the old curse from your spirit, and covets every rune you raise.

cultist.name: Cultist
cultist.desc: A hooded fanatic of the Serpent, dagger raised and a prayer of poison on his lips.

cult_zealot.name: Cult Zealot
cult_zealot.desc: A frothing true-believer who throws himself at you in an ecstasy of devotion.

naga_warrior.name: Naga Warrior
naga_warrior.desc: A serpent-bodied warrior of the deep catacombs, four arms and four blades weeping venom.

serpent_acolyte.name: Serpent Acolyte
serpent_acolyte.desc: A scaled adept who unspools hexes that drink the magic straight from your pools.

naga_priest.name: Naga Priest
naga_priest.desc: A high serpent of the cult, crowned in living vipers, whose omens foretell the Serpent Lord's strike.

cult_inquisitor.name: Cult Inquisitor
cult_inquisitor.desc: The cult's torturer-priest, who carves devotion into flesh with a venom-blackened blade.

the_serpent_lord.name: The Serpent Lord
the_serpent_lord.desc: The avatar of the cult's god — a vast serpent-man crowned in a halo of fanged shadow. He bleeds your magic with a glance, fills your veins with venom, and reads your doom in the threefold runes.

frost_sprite.name: Frost Sprite
frost_sprite.desc: A darting mote of living cold, leaving rime wherever it touches.

ice_wraith.name: Ice Wraith
ice_wraith.desc: A frozen ghost of some lost climber, drinking the heat from your blood to stave off its own cold death.

rime_thrall.name: Rime Thrall
rime_thrall.desc: A frost-blooded berserker of the Hold, ice-axe in hand and breath steaming in the killing cold.

frost_giant.name: Frost Giant
frost_giant.desc: A two-storey jarl's-man of blue flesh and glacial muscle. Slow as winter — but every blow is an avalanche, and its tremors rattle your useless shields loose.

winter_hag.name: Winter Hag
winter_hag.desc: A crone of the high passes who sings the blizzard down — her rimes herald the Jarl.

ice_troll.name: Ice Troll
ice_troll.desc: A white-furred troll of the deep crevasses, regenerating, ravenous, and strong enough to shake the ice-floor.

the_frost_jarl.name: The Frost Jarl
the_frost_jarl.desc: The giant-king of the Frostspire, crowned in a glacier's worth of ice. He seals your runes in frost, blasts the warmth from the board, and grips you fast in cold dead hands while the killing winter tolls.

imp.name: Imp
imp.desc: A cackling barb-tailed devil that blinks across the board faster than the eye can hold it.

hellhound.name: Hellhound
hellhound.desc: A coal-black mastiff of the pit, jaws venting flame, hunting in a red rush.

demon_brute.name: Demon Brute
demon_brute.desc: A slab-muscled foot-soldier of the Abyss, horns lowered, hide smoking with hellfire.

demon_cultist.name: Demon Cultist
demon_cultist.desc: A pact-sworn sorcerer half-transformed by the powers he serves, weaving raw chaos from the rift.

hell_knight.name: Hell Knight
hell_knight.desc: A damned champion in molten armor, sworn blade of the Demon Lord, every strike a gout of fire.

succubus.name: Succubus
succubus.desc: A winged temptress of the pit who drinks your will and your magic in equal draughts, sowing chaos with a whisper.

the_demon_lord.name: The Demon Lord
the_demon_lord.desc: A towering archfiend of horn and hellfire dragged up through the Rift, wreathed in a storm of chaos. He burns the board to cinders, twists your runes against you, and ends the unready with a single annihilating word.

kobold.name: Kobold
kobold.desc: A scaled dragon-servant, small and craven and quick, swarming the great hoard's approaches.

drake.name: Drake
drake.desc: A wingless cousin of the dragons, barrel-chested and venting fire from a furnace gut.

wyvern.name: Wyvern
wyvern.desc: A two-legged winged terror with a sting-tipped tail, diving from the cavern roof.

wyrm_priest.name: Wyrm Priest
wyrm_priest.desc: A draconic zealot who tends the hoard and curses any hand that reaches for a single coin.

young_dragon.name: Young Dragon
young_dragon.desc: A dragon not yet in its full might but already a peerless killer — the Great Wyrm's get, jealous of the hoard.

drake_lord.name: Drake Lord
drake_lord.desc: The alpha of the lair's drake-pack, vast and fire-gutted, herald of the Wyrm's own flame.

voice.zero: the gout of fire falls short

the_great_wyrm.name: The Great Wyrm
the_great_wyrm.desc: The ancient dragon coiled atop a mountain of plunder, old as the kingdom and twice as proud. Its breath turns the board to fire, its wings scatter your runes, and it covets every spark of treasure you dare to raise — then ends the greedy with a blast of pure ruin.

death_knight.name: Death Knight
death_knight.desc: A fallen paladin raised in black iron, the lich-king's sworn blade, every cut a hail of bone-shards.

lich_acolyte.name: Lich Acolyte
lich_acolyte.desc: A necromancer well along the road to lichdom, siphoning the living to feed his master's eternity.

wraith_lord.name: Wraith Lord
wraith_lord.desc: A greater wraith of the citadel's halls, cold enough to still a heart and strong enough to seize a hand mid-cast.

skeletal_legionnaire.name: Skeletal Legionnaire
skeletal_legionnaire.desc: A soldier of the dead legions that garrison the obsidian walls, drilled in volley-fire across a thousand years.

death_knight_champion.name: Death Knight Champion
death_knight_champion.desc: The first sword of the dead legions, a ruinous engine of black iron whose every blow lands like the lich-king's wrath.

bone_dragon.name: Bone Dragon
bone_dragon.desc: A dragon's skeleton reanimated to guard the throne-approach, breathing not fire but the cold of the grave.

the_lich_king.name: The Lich-King
the_lich_king.desc: The deathless tyrant on the obsidian throne, his phylactery a black star in his hollow chest. He tolls a chill that drinks your life while it heals his own, seizes your runes in dead-cold hands, and ends all things with a word of annihilation. The end of the road.

bloodthirsty.name: Bloodthirsty
bloodthirsty.desc: all-red → 50%: 6 dmg + warp a Defend to Fire

grasping.name: Grasping
grasping.desc: all-3s match → it snatches at your spoils: strikes 2s sooner

covetous.name: Covetous
covetous.desc: all-3s match → it plucks your heaviest rune from the board

firebrand.name: Firebrand
firebrand.desc: all-blue → warp 1 non-red card toward Fire

rotting.name: Rotting
rotting.desc: all-green → the rot knits it whole: enemy heals 5

frostbitten.name: Frostbitten
frostbitten.desc: all-blue → the chill bites: burn 3 Frost mana

spectral.name: Spectral
spectral.desc: all-Move → it phases through your guard and grips a rune 5s
